scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c magenta,cyan "npm run dev -w @compass/api" "npm run dev -w @compass/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @compass/shared && npm run build -w @compass/api && npm run build -w @compass/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @compass/shared && npm run typecheck -w @compass/api && npm run typecheck -w @compass/web
